items.title: Nine arrested in France over death of far-right student
items.dek: Quentin Deranque died on Saturday, two days after being beaten in Lyon by masked men believed to be far-left militants.

items.title: No DNA matches on glove found in Nancy Guthrie case, police say
items.dek: It's been two weeks since the 84 year old's disappearance and authorities say there have not been any arrests
